title: Raccoon Removal in City Island, Bronx | $900–$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in City Island, Bronx. Safe, humane wildlife control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a free quote!
intro: City Island's waterfront homes and historic cottages provide ideal shelter for raccoons seeking food and nesting sites. Our professional raccoon removal services protect City Island residents from property damage, attic invasions, and health hazards caused by these persistent wildlife intruders. Best Pest Control NYC offers safe, humane, and effective raccoon removal throughout this unique maritime community.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in wildlife control for City Island's distinctive island environment, understanding the unique challenges posed by waterfront properties and older homes. Our licensed technicians use proven exclusion methods and humane trapping to permanently resolve your raccoon problems while preventing future intrusions.
localContext: City Island's Victorian-era homes, yacht clubs, and seafood restaurants along City Island Avenue attract raccoons searching for shelter and food sources near the water. The island's tree-lined streets, crawl spaces in historic cottages, and proximity to Pelham Bay Park create perfect conditions for raccoon activity throughout the year.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in City Island?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in City Island typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring sealing, and whether attic cleanup or damage repair is needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Why are raccoons common in City Island?
faqs.answer: City Island's waterfront location, mature trees, older homes with accessible attics and crawl spaces, and abundance of food sources from restaurants and marinas make it highly attractive to raccoons. The island's proximity to Pelham Bay Park also provides a natural wildlife corridor for raccoons to enter residential areas.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my City Island home?
faqs.answer: Most raccoon removal projects in City Island are completed within 3-7 days, though complex cases involving mothers with babies or multiple entry points may take up to two weeks. We begin with an immediate inspection and can often start trapping within 24 hours of your call.

faqs.question: Do you offer humane raccoon removal on City Island?
faqs.answer: Yes, we exclusively use humane trapping and exclusion methods that comply with New York wildlife regulations. After safely capturing raccoons, we relocate them according to state guidelines and seal all entry points to prevent re-entry, ensuring a permanent and ethical solution for City Island homeowners.
